mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, nickname, profile_image_url, bio, manner_score, role, status, warning_count, email_event) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{bio}, #{mannerScore}, #{role}, #{status}, #{warningCount}, #{emailEvent})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member ORDER BY member_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET email = #{email}, password = #{password}, nickname = #{nickname}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, bio = #{bio}, manner_score = #{mannerScore}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, warning_count = #{warningCount}, email_event = #{emailEvent} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
